items.title: BYOMesh – New LoRa mesh radio offers 100x the bandwidth
items.author: nullagent
items.summary: BYOMesh is a new LoRa mesh radio offering up to 100x the bandwidth, enhancing IoT network performance. It supports larger payloads and faster mesh convergence. This technology is open hardware and community-driven.

items.title: DeepClaude – Claude Code agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro
items.author: alattaran
items.summary: DeepClaude uses DeepSeek V4 Pro for the same agent loop as Claude Code, 17x cheaper with no usage caps. It runs via a command and remote browser session.

items.title: Texico: Learn the principles of programming without even touching a computer
items.author: o4c
items.summary: Texico is an educational program that teaches programming principles through animated characters without using a computer. It covers five core processes: analysis, combination, generalization, abstraction, and simulation. The program is featured on NHK WORLD-JAPAN.

items.title: A treasure trove of fossils rewrites the story of early life
items.author: worldvoyageur
items.summary: Remarkably preserved fossils from southern China, including over half new species, are reshaping our understanding of life after the first mass extinction in the Phanerozoic Eon. These findings provide a detailed look at the aftermath of the Cambrian explosion.

items.title: A desktop made for one
items.author: xngbuilds
items.summary: Customizable desktop PCs are available for individual needs, featuring high-end components and silent operation. Options include all-in-one and tower designs. Choose from Intel or AMD processors for tailored performance.

items.title: Southwest Headquarters Tour
items.author: KatiMichel
items.text: After years of flying Southwest, I recently had the opportunity to tour the headquarters in Dallas. I particularly enjoyed seeing the full-motion 737 simulators, Network Operations Center, and TechOps maintenance hangar up close.
items.summary: Southwest Airlines' headquarters in Dallas features a suspended Boeing 737, exhibits of historic aircraft, and memorabilia from the company's history. The building honors co-founder Herb Kelleher and showcases significant milestones. The training center includes simulators for pilot training.

items.title: Let's Buy Spirit Air
items.author: bjhess
items.summary: A movement to buy Spirit Airlines raised over $22 million on TikTok to save it from shutdown. The initiative was started by Hunter Peterson, a voice actor. The funds nearly matched the airline's requested bailout.

items.title: OpenAI’s o1 correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients vs. 50-55% by triage doctors
items.author: donsupreme
items.summary: A Harvard study found that OpenAI's o1 model correctly diagnosed 67% of ER patients, outperforming triage doctors who achieved 50-55%. Researchers caution that AI should still act as a second opinion, not for routine clinical use.

items.title: US–Indian space mission maps extreme subsidence in Mexico City
items.author: leopoldj
items.summary: The US-Indian space mission NISAR has mapped extreme subsidence in Mexico City, showing areas sinking by over 2 centimeters per month. The data was collected between October 2025 and January 2026. This mission uses advanced radar technology to monitor land movements.

items.title: Stitch together lots of little HTML pages with navigations for interactions
items.author: OuterVale
items.summary: To stitch together many small HTML pages with navigation, use a single index page linking to each HTML page, and employ CSS for smooth transitions between interactions.

items.title: Introduction to Atom
items.author: susam
items.summary: An atom consists of protons, neutrons, and electrons. Protons and neutrons form the nucleus, while electrons orbit it. Atoms cannot be split by cutting with a knife.

items.title: Show HN: Ableton Live MCP
items.author: bschoepke
items.text:
Ever wanted to control Ableton with just your voice? Me too! I made this MCP server so I could just ask Codex to do anything in Ableton Live for me, while I was nap-trapped by my baby.

The chat messages I sent to Codex to make this:

in ableton, make a self reflective song, with audio vocals (via macos say) and chip tunes and 80's drum machines. should be a real edm banger

i want midi for everything but vocals please, with ableton devices. not prerendered audio for instruments

nee
items.summary: Ableton Live MCP allows voice control of Ableton Live using OSC commands. It facilitates communication between LLMs and Ableton Live. The server uses OSC to send and receive messages.

items.title: Roger Sweet, Creator of the He-Man Action Figure, Dies at 91
items.author: ChrisArchitect
items.summary: Roger Sweet, the creator of the He-Man action figure, died at 91. He designed the iconic toy in the 1980s for Mattel, which led to a successful cartoon series and a franchise. His work continues to inspire new adaptations.

items.title: Show HN: Apple's SHARP running in the browser via ONNX runtime web
items.author: bring-shrubbery
items.text:
Hi HN, author here. SHARP is Apple's recent single-image 3D Gaussian splatting model (https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.10685). Their reference code is PyTorch + a pretty heavy pipeline; I wanted to see if it could run in a browser with no server hop, so I exported the predictor to ONNX and ran it via onnxruntime-web with the WebGPU EP.

What works: drop in an image, get a .ply you can download o
items.summary: Apple's Sharp computer vision model runs in the browser using ONNX Runtime Web. It was showcased on Hacker News. The project is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: I built my own hair electrolysis machine
items.author: y1n0
items.summary: A DIY hair electrolysis machine was built using a custom PCB, 3D-printed components, and firmware in Rust. It employs galvanic electrolysis to destroy hair follicles permanently. The project is open-sourced.

items.title: LLMs Are Not a Higher Level of Abstraction
items.author: lelanthran
items.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) fundamentally alter programming by introducing non-deterministic abstraction, unlike traditional high-level languages. They don't fit the classic model of abstraction as they lack determinism. LLMs represent a shift in how we interact with machines.

items.title: Group averages obscure how an individual's brain controls behavior: study
items.author: hhs
items.summary: Individual brain scans reveal unique cognitive control patterns, unlike group averages. This approach highlights differences in children struggling with tasks. Such insights are crucial for understanding conditions like ADHD.

items.title: Agentic Coding Is a Trap
items.author: ayoisaiah
items.summary: Agentic coding creates dependency and risks obsolescence; companies avoiding it may dominate; reliance can lead to errors and inefficient workflows.

items.title: Nuclear receptor 4A1 linked to health effects of coffee: study
items.author: pseudolus
items.summary: Recent research from Texas A&M suggests that coffee compounds may activate NR4A1, a receptor linked to stress response and aging. This receptor may help protect the body from stress-induced damage. The study found similar effects in decaffeinated coffee, indicating caffeine is not the main benefit.

items.title: Automatic Brightness in Plasma
items.author: speckx
items.summary: Plasma 6.6 introduced automatic brightness adjustment via an ambient light sensor, requiring iio-sensor-proxy. This feature works best on laptops with built-in sensors like the Framework Laptop 13. External monitors lack built-in sensors, limiting automatic brightness.
